introSection: Cosmic Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Milky Way Adventure Park in Bideford, Devon, England, UK.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is stylised to look like a green and yellow caterpillar.

fullText:
Cosmic Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Milky Way Adventure Park in Bideford, Devon, England, UK.



The train is stylised to look like a green and yellow caterpillar.
